customer_message: How do I reset my password?
agent_response: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page, then check your email.

customer_message: Can I change my shipping address?
agent_response: Yes, if the order hasn't shipped. Share the order number and new address.

customer_message: How do I cancel my subscription?
agent_response: Go to Account → Subscriptions → Cancel. Refund is prorated.

customer_message: Can I track my order without an account?
agent_response: Use the tracking link from your confirmation email — no account needed.
